sanskritShikshan.statsDisclaimer: All figures are based on the latest available data up to June 2025.

intro.text: Under the guidance of Pujyashri, a method has been developed through which Shravaks can learn Sanskrit easily. It may be hard to believe, but it is a reality that through the 'Two Days a Week' Sanshiv project of Adhyatma Parivar, many Shravaks and Shravikas in Mumbai are progressing toward completion of Sanskrit learning.
intro.highlight: This knowledge-yajna has been continuing for two consecutive years and will continue in the future.

suddhPujaDravya.metaTitle: Pure Puja Materials Procurement | Adhyatma Department

stats.label: Total Value of Materials Purchased by Devotees

suddhPujaDravya.statsDisclaimer: All figures are based on the latest available data up to June 2025.

intro.title: Adhyatma Parivar presents worship materials that delight the devotees of the Lord!

gauseershChandan.title: Gaushirsha Sandalwood
gauseershChandan.desc: Among all sandalwoods in the world, the finest is the 'Gaushirsha' tree sandalwood found on the Malayachal mountain as described in scriptures. Licensed Adhyatma Parivar acquires sandalwood through government auctions — selecting from 16 varieties the one with the highest oil content and laboratory-certified superior quality oil. Thereafter, it undergoes lab testing through IS and GCMS methods.

chandanKaTel.title: Sandalwood Oil
chandanKaTel.desc: The most important testing factor of sandalwood is its oil. Adhyatma Parivar provides the finest quality sandalwood oil for anointing.

vasachoorna.title: Vasachurna
vasachoorna.desc: This is premium fragrance powder made from Gaushirsha sandalwood. It is also lab tested through IS and GCMS methods.

orisaya.title: Orasiya
orisaya.desc: The primary tool for performing worship with one’s own materials. Different sizes of Orasiyas are available for grinding saffron, sandalwood, etc.

kesar.title: Saffron
kesar.desc: Scriptures even mention using musk, which is warmer than saffron, in worship. Then how can there be any doubt about saffron? Even ASI reports state that: damage to marble occurs due to moisture, not saffron. Therefore, we present: pure saffron tested through 12 types of reports!

gandhakashaayiVastra.title: Gandhakashayi Cloth
gandhakashaayiVastra.desc: This is 500-count Bengali fabric – Dhaka muslin – for wiping the Lord’s idol. While using this cloth, one is reminded of the divine birth-abhishek performed by Saudharmendra!

yakshaKardamChoorna.title: Yakshakardam Powder
yakshaKardamChoorna.desc: Prepared from a mixture of Gaushirsha sandalwood, saffron, etc., this powder becomes ready quickly when ground. Thus, saffron paste for worship is prepared promptly.

soneChandiKaBarak.title: Gold-Silver Foil (Varakh)
soneChandiKaBarak.desc: The specialty of this foil is its thickness, due to which more sacred residue (Nirmalya) is obtained. As a result, Devdravyas are conserved. Knowledgeable devotees can clearly understand the weight and 100% purity of Adhyatma Parivar’s foil. Example: where elsewhere 7 grams of foil costs ₹700, Adhyatma Parivar provides 20 grams for ₹1900. This results in 25–30% savings. Each lot is tested before being made available.

soneKaBadla.title: Gold Badla – Silver Badla
soneKaBadla.desc: Gold Badla made from a mixture of 1 kg silver (999) with 7 grams gold (999), and pure silver (999) Badla are rarely available across the Jain community.

bheemsetiKapoor.title: Bhimsen Camphor
bheemsetiKapoor.desc: This Bhimsen (Baras) camphor is the finest variety. It is found only abroad and obtained from rare trees. Ghanasar camphor is also plant-derived. As per scriptures, such camphor should be mixed with saffron for worship. It makes saffron paste thicker and, due to its antifungal properties, prevents fungus and cavity formation in idols. Special note: During World War I, Germany produced 'synthetic camphor,' which is now commonly available everywhere. It is impure. Pure camphor has not been available in India.

cta.text: Contact us for information about the nearest distribution center for pure puja materials.

uddhyapanUpkaran.statsDisclaimer: All figures are based on the latest available data up to June 2025.

header.title: Uddhyapan Equipment Arrangement
header.subtitle: Identifying proper placement of equipment used in Uddhyapan and organizing Uddhyapan according to required equipment

intro.p1: Through Upadhan, various austerities and other spiritual practices, devotees perform Uddhyapan (completion ceremony) of Ratnatrayi-related equipment. Thereafter, there should be an arrangement so that these items reach places where needed and become useful for the fourfold Sangh. Otherwise, they remain stored unused at one place.
intro.p2: Due to its wide network, Adhyatma Parivar has become a 'bridge' for such arrangements. So far, equipment has been delivered to approximately 70 Sanghs.

gallery.title: A Unique Glimpse of the Equipment!

cta.text: Contact us for assistance in organizing Uddhyapan and providing equipment.

uttamBhaktidrivya.metaTitle: Research of Superior Devotional Materials | Adhyatma Department
uttamBhaktidrivya.statsDisclaimer: All figures are based on the latest available data up to June 2025.

header.title: Research of Superior Devotional Materials
header.subtitle: In-depth research of materials, herbs, etc. required for devotion to the Lord

intro.text: This is a project in which research-enthusiasts of Adhyatma Parivar dedicate hundreds of hours, travel thousands of kilometers, and even roam inside forests with permission from the Forest Department, putting in effort like the churning of the ocean. When finally a result like 'nectar' is obtained, the effort feels worthwhile. There are many such inspiring aspects to know...

uttamBhaktidrivya.documentCaption: By the grace of the Lord’s Shasan, after receiving permission from the Central Government of India to obtain medicinal herbs from forests across the country, the enthusiasm of Adhyatma Parivar has increased 100 times.

abhishek.title: Abhishek Herbs...
abhishek.desc: If one compares the price of a medicinal herb like Triphala used in medicine with the price of a complete 18-Abhishek packet, doubt naturally arises whether the packet truly contains genuine herbs. Therefore, Adhyatma Parivar has begun efforts to procure pure herbs. Along with this, soil from various pilgrimage sites and water from sacred rivers are also being collected.

captions: Sacred soil from various pilgrimage sites

viharSuraksha.statsDisclaimer: All figures are based on the latest available data up to June 2025.

header.title: Vihar Safety
header.subtitle: Sending staff across India to ensure the safety of Sadhvijis during Vihar

intro.text: While describing the types of support required in the Shramani field in the Yogashastra scripture, the omniscient of the Kaliyug states:
intro.highlight: A Shravak must protect the Shramani group from wicked and immoral people.
intro.text2: Adhyatma Parivar is dedicated to devotion across all seven fields. Through this work, the organization gains the opportunity to ensure the safety of ascetics and relieve them of concerns related to money and logistics.

captions.left: Trained staff accompany during Vihar and become instrumental in serving Sadhviji Bhagwants.
captions.right: Whether the Vihar is from Mumbai to Bengaluru or from Ahmedabad to Chennai, as soon as Adhyatma Parivar receives the message, proper arrangements are made!

parishthapanikaSamiti.metaTitle: Parishthapanika Samiti Security – Construction of Matru Kundi and Sthandil Bhoomi (Dome) | Adhyatma Department
parishthapanikaSamiti.statsDisclaimer: All figures are based on the latest available data up to June 2025.

header.title: Parishthapanika Samiti Security
header.subtitle: Construction of Matru Kundi and Sthandil Dome for the protection of the Parishthapanika Samiti of the Chaturvidh Sangh

intro.text: The life of Charitra lies in the five Samitis and three Guptis. Who does not know that in the present time, observing the fifth Samiti has become extremely difficult? In place of dense forests, in the crowd of closely packed buildings, this Samiti seems to have been crushed! At such a time, under the guidance of the revered Krupanath, whose veins flow with the blood of Charitra, an extraordinary solution was found. Very soon its fragrance spread across the entire nation. Adhyatma Parivar received the opportunity to assist hundreds and thousands of monks and nuns in the observance of their Charitra!

details.text: The special charcoal used in these Matru Kundis built at various places across India has completely put an end to complaints of foul odor!
These Sthandil Bhoomi (Domes) constructed in various Shri Sanghs across India have made the impossible possible!

cta.heading: Do you wish to construct a Matru Kundi / Sthandil Dome?

header.title: Charitra Equipment Devotion
header.subtitle: Devotion to the revered ones through selected equipment that helps avoid transgressions in the observance of Charitra

intro.text: This work is already being carried out widely in the Jain tradition. The main objective of Adhyatma Parivar is to serve the revered ones with such equipment that allows Charitra to be observed in a more radiant and pure manner.

items.title: This is pure warm woolen blanket.
items.desc: It also protects from transgressions related to fire-bodied beings after usage.

items.title: Now there is no need to use copper or plastic pots.
items.desc: This wooden lota will also protect the monastic community from self-transgression.

items.title: This is pure wool.
items.desc: It protects from transgressions related to fire-bodied beings.

items.title: The reel of nose-string also serves a similar purpose.
The silk thread reel is for the border of the Ogha cloth.
items.desc: This is specially for the devotion of revered nuns.

items.title: So that plastic baskets need not be used,
items.desc: these are wooden baskets available in various sizes as an alternative.

jalStand.metaTitle: Hot Water Cooling Stand | Adhyatma Department

stats.label: Total Stands Offered in Shri Sangh Vihardhams

jalStand.statsDisclaimer: All figures are based on the latest available data up to June 2025.

header.title: Hot Water Cooling Stand
header.subtitle: Distribution of stands for cooling boiled water

intro.text: In summer, boiled water does not cool quickly. Therefore, in some Vihardhams and Ayambil Shalas, sometimes half-heated water is cooled without properly boiling it. The solution to this serious fault is: the Water Cooling Stand.

features.title: This stand has several special features
list: Instead of lightweight aluminum, Govt. Approved food-grade 'Stainless Steel' has been used.
As no tap is used in this, the observance of Jayna is maintained.
It has a 12-track flow system. As the water circulates through these tracks, water heated to 100° cools down to approximately 32° by the time it reaches the bottom.

dharmanusthan.metaTitle: Availability of Decorative Materials for Religious Rituals | Adhyatma Department
dharmanusthan.statsDisclaimer: All figures are based on the latest available data up to June 2025.

header.title: Availability of Decorative Materials for Religious Rituals
header.subtitle: Work Started : V.S. 2076

intro.text: Whether it is Pujan or Puja, Mahotsav or Mahapuja, Vandana or Samvedana, numerous unique items such as four-foot Kalash that enhance devotion in all religious rituals have been collected by the Parivar. These are made available to everyone for use without any charge. Till now, through the collection of hundreds of such items, nearly 400 occasions have been beautified.

gallery.title: A unique glimpse of these materials!

cta.heading: Want to make your religious rituals attractive?
cta.content: We provide Kalash and other decorative materials to make Pujas, Mahapujas, and rituals emotionally uplifting and aesthetically beautiful.

anusthanAayojan.statsDisclaimer: All figures are based on the latest available data up to June 2025.

intro.text: Adhyatma Parivar organizes group Diksha, Upadhan Tap, Vachana–Series, S3 special Q&A discourses, Pratishtha Mahotsav, Mahapujas, and recently has taken a step forward by organizing Brahmyatra and similar rituals, which plant the seed of enlightenment in the lives of thousands.
intro.highlight: The practice of Upadhan transforms the direction of life.

vachana.title: Vachana – Series
vachana.desc: So far, approximately 25,000 listeners have received the nectar of Jinvaani through the Vachana – Series.

brahmyatra.title: Brahmyatra
brahmyatra.desc: Under 'Brahmyatra', youth aged 15 to 25 became blessed by visiting the ancient pilgrimage sites of Lord Neminath.

deeksha.title: 'Sinhsattvotsav' Group 74 Diksha – A human ocean of devotion

adhyatmshala.statsDisclaimer: All figures are based on the latest available data up to June 2025.

intro.text: Today’s children are the future guardians of the Jain tradition. If they are not given proper values, atheism may settle in their hearts and minds. In the Sanghs operated by Adhyatma Parivar and at the Chaturmas locations of guiding Suribhagwants and their obedient monks, the ‘Adhyatmashala’ curriculum currently running at a primary level has had such an impact that parents of children become deeply emotional while expressing gratitude to the organizers.
intro.caption: Children are joyfully studying in Adhyatmashala!

cta.heading: Contact us for special information about the Bal Sanskar Pathshala near you.

paiyashala.metaTitle: Paiyashala – Prakrit Teaching School | Adhyatma Department

intro.text: The language that carries within it the original teachings of Lord Mahavir—so that the Chaturvidh Sangh can study it through a solid and simple method—this wonderful project is currently functioning for revered nuns. Gradually, it will become operational for the entire Sangh.

jivantDrishyawali.statsDisclaimer: All figures are based on the latest available data up to June 2025.

intro.text: Adhyatma Parivar has prepared various live dramatic presentations (emotion-enhancing plays) that soak the heart in the essence of detachment and overflow it with pride for the Jain tradition. Special care has been taken to preserve the dignity of scriptures and great personalities; therefore, instead of portraying the roles of Bhagwan, monks, or other great beings, only enlightening incidents are depicted. After watching these presentations, viewers experience a unique emotional awakening. So far, presentations like 'Bhavprapanch', 'Anandkranti', and 'Shauryagatha' have become instrumental in transforming many lives.

gallery.title: Such scenes from 'Shauryagatha' have brought tears even to the strongest eyes!

prabhubhaktiUpkaran.metaTitle: Manufacturing of Devotional Equipment | Adhyatma Department

header.title: Manufacturing of Devotional Equipment
header.subtitle: Creation of equipment to enhance devotion in Prabhubhakti and other rituals

intro.text: Artistic, lifelike creations that overflow the heart with devotion at first sight—such as the 14 Mahaswapnas, cradle, Pokhana, Ashtamangal, materials for 56 Dik-kumaris, lotus for Sthapana, chariot, treasury, four-foot Kalash, etc.—have been created by Adhyatma Parivar.

sections.title: Here one can witness a realistic depiction of the dreams seen by the Lord’s mother.
If this cradle is so magnificent, how extraordinary must have been the cradle in which Mother Trishala rocked the Lord?

legalCell.metaTitle: Legal Guidance: Legal Cell | Adhyatma Department

intro.text: A complete team of Chartered Accountants with more than 25 years of experience within Adhyatma Parivar remains active to ensure that Jain trusts receive guidance in matters related to Income Tax, Trust Act, and other legal challenges.

advocacy.title: Protection from Religion-Obstructing Laws
advocacy.text: The leading members of Adhyatma Parivar actively use their legal insight, recognition, and influence to prevent or amend laws that obstruct religious practices—whether such laws are under consideration by the government or have already been enacted.

stories.text1: No, these are not letters written merely to fill files. Some of these letters have successfully prevented GST from being imposed on certain donations received by trusts, while others have suggested precautions to ensure that no religion-obstructing clauses enter the UCC.
stories.text2: Some letters were written to ensure that Shri Sammed Shikhar Mahatirth does not become merely a tourism place, while others have successfully prevented the export of live animals.

deeksha.title: A Landmark of Fortune: Protection of Bal Diksha
deeksha.text: The title of the book 'Bal Diksha ko Rajmanyata' itself bears testimony. The long-standing risk over Bal Diksha has been removed, and through state recognition, 'Bal Diksha' has been glorified.

cta.heading: Guidance available in matters related to Income Tax and Trust Act for trusts and Sanghs

intro.p1: In the praise of Parshva Prabhu we say: 'Nemi – Raji chitt viraji vilokit vrat liye.'
intro.p2: This means that viewing sacred paintings increases detachment, and beholding the sacred panels enhances devotion. Therefore, Adhyatma Parivar is preparing such artworks that greatly elevate auspicious sentiments.

completed.text: So far, artworks such as the life depiction of Shri Munisuvrat Swami, the personality portrait of Pujya Haribhadrasurishwarji Maharaj, illustrated compilations of Kalpasutra-Barasasootra-Samachari, portraits of lineage-based revered Gurus, incident paintings of ancient revered personalities, and panels of Giriraj and other pilgrimages have been completed.

workshop.text: Creating artworks that visually present the Sadhu Samachari described in Shri Kalpasutra is an initiative of Adhyatma Parivar.
